campaign_name: Sip, Dance, Wow: Keetli's Trendy Tea Time
target_audience: Young adults and millennials in Islamabad who enjoy social media trends, love cafe culture, and are seeking fun, interactive experiences. Ideal for those who appreciate a unique tea experience and are active on TikTok and Instagram.
tone: Playful, engaging, and community-focused with a touch of modern flair

content_pillars.description: Engage patrons with the viral Moye Moye dance while sipping on Kashmiri tea, turning a popular trend into a fun and shareable moment at Keetli.
content_pillars.example_topic: Kick-off post announcing the Moye Moye Tea Dance Challenge with a video of staff performing the dance.

content_pillars.description: Create serene and memorable moments at Keetli by incorporating the 'Tea Sip Silence' challenge, encouraging patrons to share peaceful tea experiences.
content_pillars.example_topic: Feature a video of patrons participating in the Tea Sip Silence Challenge, capturing their serene moments.

content_pillars.description: Showcase the aesthetic beauty and unique presentation of Keetli's offerings, encouraging customers to share their 'wow' moments with the hashtag #KeetliWow.
content_pillars.example_topic: Highlight a customer's stunning photo of their Kashmiri tea setup with a caption that plays on the 'Looking Like a Wow' trend.

content_pillars.description: Offer a glimpse into the playful atmosphere at Keetli, from staff dance-offs to role swaps, showcasing the cafe's vibrant energy.
content_pillars.example_topic: Share a behind-the-scenes video of a spontaneous staff dance-off, incorporating the 'She Don't Know Dance Challenge'.

key_messages: Experience the dance and flavor of Kashmiri tea at Keetli.
Capture your serene moment with our Tea Sip Silence.
Join the fun and show us your #KeetliWow.
Step behind the scenes and dance with us at Keetli.
hashtag_strategy: Use a mix of campaign-specific hashtags like #KeetliDanceChallenge, #TeaSipSilence, and #KeetliWow with popular local hashtags such as #IslamabadEats, #CafeCulture, and #TeaLovers to maximize reach.
visual_style: Bright and colorful visuals with playful typography, capturing the fun and cozy atmosphere of Keetli. Use dynamic video content and vibrant photography to engage the audience.
